tool.name: Mac Screenshot
tool.description: Capture a screenshot of the Mac screen.

path.description: Path to save screenshot (if not provided, returns base64 data)

display.description: Display index to capture (null for main display)

ai.systemPromptSection:
### mac_screenshot
Capture a screenshot of the Mac screen.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "mac_screenshot", "query": "{\"path\": \"/path/to/save.png\"}"}
```

**Parameters:**
- path: Save location (optional, returns base64 if not provided)
- display: Display index (optional)
- includeWindows: Include window contents (default: true)

**Returns:** success, path or imageData (base64), width, height
whenToUse: Need visual context of what's on screen
